title: pseudocalymma macrocarpum
intro: Pseudocalymma macrocarpum, also known as the large-fruited Pseudocalymma, is a plant species in the family Pentaphyllaceae that is native to tropical Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pseudocalymma macrocarpum include the relief of fever, headaches, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in treating skin conditions. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, and it can also be used in the form of a paste or ointment for topical application.
